form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (30.87) when fifth over 525m at The Meadows in a Grade 5. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and five minors. Can feature with the right run.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 1.75 lengths at Shepparton over 390m (22.03) beating Foxy Jay in Grade 4/5 on April 13. Has hit winning form and can go on with it.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Bendigo over 425m. Last start finished last on April 11 over 525m at The Meadows behind Lamia Nonna Mim beaten 15 lengths (31.26) in a Grade 5. Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.
